summary: Completed frontend testing of CLT Academy ERP new launcher-style home screen. All 6 section icons working correctly. Fixed login redirect bug (was redirecting to /dashboard instead of /home).
passed_tests: Login with Super Admin credentials (aqib@clt-academy.com / A@qib1234) - SUCCESS
Login redirects to /home with icon launcher - SUCCESS (after fix)
Home launcher shows 6 section icons centered (Sales, Customer Service, Academics, Operations, Security, Finance) - SUCCESS
'Select a module to get started' text displayed - SUCCESS
No sidebar visible on home page - SUCCESS
Clicking Sales icon navigates to /sales - SUCCESS
Sales sidebar shows: Home button, Sales header with icon, Sales CRM, Sales Dashboard, Today's Follow-ups, Settings - SUCCESS
Clicking Home button returns to /home launcher - SUCCESS
Clicking Customer Service icon navigates to /cs/dashboard - SUCCESS
CS sidebar shows: Home button, Customer Service header, CS Dashboard, Customer Service - SUCCESS
Clicking Academics icon navigates to /mentor - SUCCESS
Academics sidebar shows: Home button, Academics header, Mentor CRM, Mentor Dashboard - SUCCESS
Clicking Operations icon navigates to /dashboard - SUCCESS
Operations sidebar shows: Home button, Operations header, Dashboard, Leads Pool, Customer Master, Departments, Courses - SUCCESS
Clicking Security icon navigates to /access-control - SUCCESS
Security sidebar shows: Home button, Security header, Access Control, User Management - SUCCESS
Clicking Finance icon navigates to /finance - SUCCESS
Finance sidebar shows: Home button, Finance header, Finance, Commission Engine - SUCCESS

bugs_fixed.issue: PublicRoute was redirecting authenticated users to /dashboard instead of /home
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed Navigate to='/dashboard' to Navigate to='/home'

context_for_next_testing_agent: New launcher-style home screen fully implemented and tested. After login, users land on /home with 6 centered section icons (Sales, Customer Service, Academics, Operations, Security, Finance). Clicking any icon shows a focused sidebar with only that section's items plus a Home button to return to launcher. All data-testid attributes working: section-icon-{id} for icons, nav-home for Home button, nav-{item-name} for sidebar items.

features_verified.home_launcher: Working - Shows 6 section icons centered with welcome message
features_verified.sales_sidebar: Working - Home, Sales header, Sales CRM, Sales Dashboard, Today's Follow-ups, Settings
features_verified.cs_sidebar: Working - Home, Customer Service header, CS Dashboard, Customer Service
features_verified.academics_sidebar: Working - Home, Academics header, Mentor CRM, Mentor Dashboard
features_verified.operations_sidebar: Working - Home, Operations header, Dashboard, Leads Pool, Customer Master, Departments, Courses
features_verified.security_sidebar: Working - Home, Security header, Access Control, User Management
features_verified.finance_sidebar: Working - Home, Finance header, Finance, Commission Engine
features_verified.home_button: Working - Returns to /home launcher from any section
